_comment_2: 'conditioning_embedding_in_channels' is overwritten at instantiation by ConditioningAssembler.total_channels.
_comment_3: MONAI's ControlNetConditioningEmbedding inserts (len(channels) - 1) stride-2 conv blocks. The proposal's default [16, 32, 64] was inherited from MAISI's image-space CT pipeline (image conditioning -> 4x downsample to latent). VENA conditions in latent space already (mask/priors live in the 4x-compressed MAISI grid), so we use a single-block embedding [64] for zero spatial downsampling. Override with [16, 32, 64] in an ablation YAML that conditions on image-resolution inputs.
